_comment: DNS-over-HTTPS capable public resolvers. Used by the network module when the user opts to change DNS. Fields: name, ipv4 (primary+secondary), ipv6 (primary+secondary), dohEndpoint (HTTPS URL for Set-DnsClientDohServerAddress on Win11), quickDescription. Windows 11 22H2+ auto-negotiates DoH when the endpoint is registered.

providers.name: Cloudflare
providers.quickDescription: Fastest in most regions. No filtering, privacy-focused.

providers.name: Quad9
providers.quickDescription: Malware blocking on by default. Swiss non-profit.

providers.name: NextDNS
providers.quickDescription: Placeholder — NextDNS requires a per-user config ID appended to the DoH URL (dns.nextdns.io/<id>). Sign up at nextdns.io.

providers.name: AdGuard DNS
providers.quickDescription: Ads + trackers + malware blocking on by default.
